name: task-flow
description: Per-task quality flow + deterministic CI gate for Claude Code — ingest → 2× premortem → TDD → adversarial code-review → conditional security-review → live verify → close, plus a portable secret-scan + migration-guard + protected-branch gate scaffolded into any repo + a decompose skill that slices an epic/feature/spec into dependency-linked tasks (DoD, Story Points, graph) and pushes them to the tracker.
